name: XMax V3 NANO Glass Mouthpiece
summary: XMax V3 NANO Glass Mouthpiece — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The XMax V3 Nano Glass Mouthpiece is a genuine replacement component designed to refresh airflow quality and flavour clarity on the XMax V3 Nano vaporiser. Constructed from quality glass, it provides a neutral vapour path and a smoother inhalation compared to worn or damaged mouthpieces. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
